content.text: Each project can hold a curated set of
(style guides, manuals, codebases, interview transcripts, research PDFs, etc.) that Claude can reference across all conversations in that project.
(about 200k tokens, roughly a 500‑page book), so within a project it can meaningfully ground outputs on your uploaded knowledge.
This makes projects particularly suited to long‑term work like product docs, legal or policy work, course creation, data analysis, or multi‑file coding tasks.
